title: triglochin procera var. dubia
intro: Triglochin procera var. dubia, also known as the yellow form of the druid's spurge or druid's candle, is a lesser-known variety of the Triglochin procera plant, which is native to New Zealand. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Triglochin procera var. dubia include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections, skin conditions, and inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, it is often used in traditional medicine as a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea.
